messages.content: How would you respond to the following statement: I always follow rules and authority.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I'm more tough-minded than other people.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I think I could 'beat' a lie detector.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I've often done something dangerous just for the thrill of it.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never pretended to be someone else in order to get something.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I always plan out my weekly activities.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I like to see fist-fights.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I'm not tricky or sly.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I'd be good at a dangerous job because I make fast decisions.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: My friends would say that I am a warm person.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I would not enjoy 'scamming' someone.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never attacked someone with the idea of injuring them.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I never miss appointments.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I avoid horror movies.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I trust other people to be honest.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I hate high-speed driving.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I don't enjoy doing wild things.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I don't bother to keep in touch with my family anymore.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I find it difficult to manipulate people.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I rarely follow the rules.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I never cry at movies.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I don't enjoy gambling for real money.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: People sometimes say that I'm cold-hearted.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: People can usually tell if I am lying.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I like to have sex with people I barely know.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I love violent sports and movies.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I am an impulsive person.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I'm a soft-hearted person.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I don't enjoy taking risks.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: Most people tell lies every day.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I keep getting in trouble for the same things over and over.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: Every now and then I carry a weapon (knife or gun) for protection.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I easily get bored.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I admit that I often "mouth off" without thinking.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I would never step on others to get what I want.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: None of my close friends have ever served time in prison.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never shoplifted from a store.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I can talk people into anything.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I purposely tried to hit someone with the vehicle I was driving.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have violated my parole from prison.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have taken illegal drugs (e.g., marijuana, ecstasy).
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never been involved in delinquent gang activity.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never stolen a truck, car or motorcycle.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: Most people are wimps.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I never flatter people just to get them on my side.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never tricked someone into giving me money.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: It tortures me to see an injured animal.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have assaulted a law enforcement official or social worker.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never tried to force someone to have sex.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I feel so sorry when I see a homeless person.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I don't enjoy testing people's limits just to upset them.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have broken into a building or vehicle in order to steal something or vandalize.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have never been arrested.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: You should never take advantage of people, even if they might do it to you.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: You should never pretend to like someone just to get what you want.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have taken hard drugs (e.g., heroin, cocaine).
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: People are too sensitive when I tell them the truth about themselves.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I was convicted of a serious crime.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: People cry way too much at funerals.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: You can get what you want by telling people what they want to hear.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I usually feel guilty when I hurt others.
I would answer that I strongly agree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I have threatened people into giving me money, clothes, or makeup.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: A lot of people are "suckers" and can easily be fooled.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
How would you respond to the following statement: I sometimes dump friends that I don't need anymore.
I would answer that I strongly disagree with that statement.
